name: AI Agents
description: Custom AI assistants that automate customer interactions, qualify leads, answer frequently asked questions, and support internal operations.
benefit: Reduce response times and increase operational efficiency.

name: Workflow Automation
description: Automate repetitive tasks and connect processes across teams, departments, and software platforms.
benefit: Reduce manual work and improve productivity.

name: System Integrations
description: Connect CRMs, databases, spreadsheets, communication platforms, and business applications into a unified ecosystem.
benefit: Eliminate data silos and improve information flow.

name: Data Intelligence
description: Transform raw business data into actionable insights through dashboards, reporting, and AI-powered analytics.
benefit: Support faster and more accurate decision-making.

name: Customer Support Automation
description: Automate ticket handling, customer communication, and support workflows using AI-powered systems.
benefit: Improve customer satisfaction while reducing support costs.

name: Sales Process Optimization
description: Automate lead qualification, follow-up sequences, pipeline management, and sales reporting.
benefit: Increase conversion rates and reduce administrative work.
